ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" TEXT /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client for the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the project */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last updated date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sprints" (
  "sprint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sprint */,
  "sprint_name" TEXT /* Name of the sprint */,
  "sprint_description" TEXT /* Description of the sprint */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sprint */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sprint */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the sprint belongs to */,
  "sprint_status" TEXT /* Current status of the sprint */,
  "goal" TEXT /* Goal or objective of the sprint */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the sprint */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last updated date of the sprint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sprint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sprints_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_stories" (
  "user_story_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user story */,
  "user_story_name" TEXT /* Name of the user story */,
  "user_story_description" TEXT /* Description of the user story */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the user story */,
  "sprint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sprint the user story belongs to */,
  "user_story_status" TEXT /* Current status of the user story */,
  "estimated_hours" TEXT /* Estimated hours for completing the user story */,
  "actual_hours" TEXT /* Actual hours spent on the user story */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the user story */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last updated date of the user story */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_story_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stories_sprint_id FOREIGN KEY ("sprint_id") REFERENCES sprints ("sprint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "task_description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the task */,
  "user_story_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user story the task belongs to */,
  "assigned_to_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member the task is assigned to */,
  "task_status" TEXT /* Current status of the task */,
  "estimated_hours" TEXT /* Estimated hours for completing the task */,
  "actual_hours" TEXT /* Actual hours spent on the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the task */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last updated date of the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_user_story_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_story_id") REFERENCES user_stories ("user_story_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_assigned_to_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to_id") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_member_name" TEXT /* Name of the team member */,
  "team_member_email" TEXT /* Email of the team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the team member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the team member */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the team member record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last updated date of the team member record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stakeholders" (
  "stakeholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stakeholder */,
  "stakeholder_name" TEXT /* Name of the stakeholder */,
  "stakeholder_email" TEXT /* Email of the stakeholder */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the stakeholder */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the stakeholder */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the stakeholder */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the stakeholder record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last updated date of the stakeholder record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stakeholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member the notification was sent to */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_team_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_member_id") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedbacks" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was given */,
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member the feedback was given to */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedbacks_team_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_member_id") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member who made the comment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the comment is related to */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_team_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_member_id") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "attachment_file" TEXT /* File name of the attachment */,
  "attachment_date" TEXT /* Date the attachment was uploaded */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the attachment is related to */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the attachment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_references" (
  "external_reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external reference */,
  "external_reference_url" TEXT /* URL of the external reference */,
  "external_reference_date" TEXT /* Date the external reference was added */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the external reference is related to */,
  "reference_type" TEXT /* Type of external reference */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the external reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("external_reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_references_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the tag */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last updated date of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)
